{{CargoRelic
|name=Commercial Code
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=04-10
|source=* Club Chest (2%), Lottery Machine (0.07%), Novice Scrolls (1%), Wishing (3.1%)
* [[Peter Jr.]] - [[Rare Rent]]
|description=
On Apr 10, 1673, the French commercial law war issued, which is the origin of the current commercial law system.

In the past, people mostly carried out business practices based on customs, which were also the basis to resolve disputes. This law created a reliable code of practice to resolve disputes in trades.
|fame=44
|art=29
|fth=21
|civ=30
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail DEF +2<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss2=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail DEF +4<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss3=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail DEF +6<br>Chores Completed: 300/300 
|ss4=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail DEF +10<br>Chores Completed: 300/300
|ss7=Per 20 Chores completed, Snail DEF +10<br>Chores Completed: 300/300<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Lumbercamp skill I.png|frameless|50x50px]] Place in Lumber Camp: Lumber Max Cap +5%
}}

[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Dragon Gene Speedup Boost]]
